payload.query: In recent decades, we have seen a rise in the adoption of gender quotas. What is the most salient factor(s) that explain quota adoption?

articles.title: Read the Supreme Court’s Decision on Trump’s Sweeping Tariffs

articles.title: When Life Gave Her Ageism, She Created Oldster
articles.abstract: Sari Botton started a Substack about getting older after finding employers were reluctant to hire her, a middle-aged woman. With more than 70,000 subscribers, she has clearly struck a nerve.
